# TalkSpark SvelteKit instructions

See [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md) and [src/styles/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md](../../src/styles/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md).

SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5 runes. Remote functions for AI (`*.remote.ts`). Path aliases: `components`, `stores`, `styles`, `ts`, `lib`.

Interactive UI: Zag (`@zag-js/svelte` + `@zag-js/*` machines) — see `.agents/skills/talkspark-interactive-ui/SKILL.md`.
